perspectives.description: The DECIDER is the person who found the embarrassing photo and is considering whether to post it for amusement. Their decision will impact their reputation and the feelings of their classmate.
The PRIMARY_AFFECTED is the high school classmate in the photo who would feel humiliated if the image is shared publicly. Their emotional well-being and privacy are at stake.
The THIRD_PARTY includes friends and followers on social media who may see the post and react to it. Their responses could influence the social dynamics and the DECIDER's future interactions.
